content_body: The Historic Henn Theatre was established in 1934 and is now starting to shine even brighter! We have added all-new surround sound to the theater and are working on expanding the facilities as well as offering a larger selection of concessions. Our hope is that you will walk into the theater and experience the history, as well as enjoy the technology of the future. Check our website for showings. While staying in one of our Murphy, NC cabins, check out the theatre for a date night!
title: The Historic Henn Theatre
